headline: Jim Cramer Says Banks Like JPMorgan “Are Still Inexpensive”
summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) was among the stocks on Jim Cramer’s radar on Mad Money, as he advised investors to care about where a stock is going, not where it has been. Cramer mentioned the stock during the episode, as he commented: We’re no longer hearing about onerous regulation. That ended when Trump came […]

headline: JPMorgan Posted Record Profits, but CEO Jamie Dimon Says the Next Crisis Will Be Worse Than Anyone Expects
summary: JPMorgan Chase (NYSE:JPM) reported Q1 2026 net income of $16.5 billion, with EPS of $5.94, up 17% from a year earlier. Revenue hit $49.836 billion. Markets revenue set a record at $11.6 billion, up 20% year over year. Investment banking fees jumped 28%, with advisory fees up 82%. The stock has climbed 26% over the ... JPMorgan Posted Record Profits, but CEO Jamie Dimon Says the Next Crisis Will Be Worse Than Anyone Expects
